headline: Super Micro Scandal Is a Big Win for Dell Stock
summary: Dell Technologies  stock surged Friday on news that had nothing to do with Dell.  The PC and server company got a boost after the Justice Department charged three individuals associated with  Super Micro Computer  Dell’s arch-rival, for allegedly skirting export-control laws by diverting $2.5 billion worth of U.S.-assembled servers to China.  One of the defendants is Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw, Super Micro’s co-founder and senior vice president, as well as a board member.

One of the defendants is Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw, Super Micro’s co-founder and senior vice president, as well as a board member.

headline: How The Reliance Industries (NSEI:RELIANCE) Story Is Evolving On Small Valuation Tweaks And New Deals
summary: Reliance Industries has seen its modelled fair value adjusted slightly, from ₹1,718.08 to ₹1,717.11, a change of less than ₹1. Street research on transport names such as Ryder shows how analysts often fine tune targets when they reassess earnings assumptions and valuation frameworks, which helps put this minor reset for Reliance into context. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these small price target moves and track the evolving analyst story around the stock. Analyst Price...
